notes: Google Calendar for Slack event notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Common in account/deal channels when a meeting, QBR, or joint session is scheduled — often paired with a human follow-up in a thread. No 'View in Salesforce' button (this is a calendar app, not a CRM record); a calendar link button is optional.

examples.name: event_scheduled
examples.when: A meeting / QBR / joint working session is scheduled with a customer or internal team.

elements.text: Agenda: open items · renewal readiness · next-quarter roadmap
